rationale: In the citing paper, Monga and Houston (2006) appears only as part of a grouped background citation in the literature review, used to support a broad statement about prior work on consumer perceptions. The paper does not discuss this source's specific findings (e.g., fading optimism), nor does it use it to build hypotheses, define the focal mechanism, or justify methods/measures. The core theorizing and empirical positioning are instead tied to dynamic-rank and momentum/attribution work, so this citation functions as a passing literature mention.
